jd_text:
Director of Engineering
Job Purpose: We are partnering with a leading FS organization to appoint a Director of Engineering to lead and scale a critical engineering function.This is a senior leadership role focused on shaping engineering strategy, driving modern development practices, and establishing strong governance to ensure consistent, high-quality delivery across multiple teams.The role is ideal for candidates currently operating at Exec Engineering level within complex, enterprise environments.
Key Responsibilities: Define and execute the engineering strategy aligned with business objectives and enterprise architectureLead and scale multiple engineering teams, driving a culture of innovation, quality, and continuous improvementEstablish and enforce engineering governance frameworks, including standards, controls, and best practicesDrive adoption of modern engineering practices such as Agile, DevSecOps, CI/CD, and cloud-native developmentEnsure delivery of secure, scalable, and high-performing technology solutionsCollaborate with product, architecture, and business stakeholders to align priorities and deliver valueMonitor and improve engineering performance through KPIs (velocity, quality, incident management)Build, mentor, and develop high-performing engineering teams
What We’re Looking For: Leadership & Strategic ThinkingProven experience leading large-scale engineering organizationsStrong track record in defining and executing engineering strategy at enterprise levelExperience working closely with business and architecture stakeholders Governance & Delivery ExcellenceDemonstrated experience implementing engineering standards, frameworks, and governance modelsStrong knowledge of DevSecOps, CI/CD, and secure engineering practicesFocus on quality, performance, and continuous improvement at scale Technical BackgroundExperience with cloud platforms (AWS, Azure, or GCP)Strong understanding of microservices, APIs, and modern architecture patterns People & Stakeholder ManagementAbility to lead, mentor, and scale engineering teamsStrong communication and stakeholder management skills across senior leadership
